AI Chief Of Staff

AI Emaily is the AI-native inbox that runs like your chief of staff. It reads every message, triages what actually needs you, and quiets the noise. It drafts replies in your own voice — not generic AI text — then schedules and sends across Gmail, Outlook, and any provider from one inbox. Three modes: Manual, Copilot, Autopilot. You approve, it acts, with undo and a full audit trail on everything. Your mail is never used to train models. Start free.

Free [...] Hey Product Hunt 👋 I'm Nafiul, maker of AI Emaily. I built this because my inbox had quietly become my second job. Not the thinking — the typing. The same "sounds good, Tuesday works," the polite follow-ups, the triage of what actually needs me. Every "AI email" tool I tried just summarized the pile or spat out replies that sounded nothing like me. So AI Emaily is an inbox with an autonomous assistant that: • Triages — surfaces what needs you, quiets the rest • Writes in your voice — learns your tone, drafts replies that actually sound like you • Runs on autopilot — schedules and sends, with your approval • Works everywhere — Gmail, Outlook, any provider, one inbox You stay in control the whole time: three modes (Manual → Copilot → Autopilot), human approval before any send, plus undo and [...] Report

results.title: 15 Best AI Email Assistants for Productivity in 2026 Tested
results.content:
Key Features:   
  + SecureSend: State-of-the-art encryption ensures that only the intended recipient can read your message.
  + Copilot AI: An on-device assistant that summarizes threads and drafts replies without exposing data.
 Best For: Security-conscious industries (Legal, Health, Finance) where data privacy is non-negotiable.
 Pricing: Free basic version; Growth version starts from $3/mo.

### 13. Writemail.ai

The drafter

Writemail.ai is a straightforward, no-nonsense tool. You paste the email you received, select your desired tone (Professional, Funny, Angry), and it generates a reply. It is a standalone web tool rather than an integrated plugin, making it useful for one-off drafting needs. [...] ### 14. Ellie (tryellie.com)

The style mimic

Ellie is a browser extension that prides itself on learning your writing style better than others. It allows you to define "Knowledge Base" snippets so it knows about your product or company when drafting replies. It works across Gmail and Fastmail. However, you only get a limited number of replies unless you upgrade to their most expensive plan ($79/mo).

 Key Features:   
  + Style learning: Analyzes your writing patterns to produce drafts that sound authentic to you.
  + Browser extension: Works lightly in the background of Chrome or Firefox without slowing down your browser.
 Best for: PR professionals who need to maintain a highly personal voice in their communications.
 Pricing: Starts from $19/mo for 25 replies a day. [...] ### 1. Gmelius

The AI platform for email power users

Gmelius transforms Gmail into a productivity powerhouse built on AI. Unlike other tools that provide generic results, Gmelius brings real context. It’s trained on years of inbox data to learn exactly how you write. Optionally, you can train it on a knowledge database to auto-generate highly informed messages. The AI is highly customizable, according to your needs.

Its "Meli" AI assistant doesn't just summarize threads, like most platforms. It also helps manage shared inboxes (like support@ or sales@) directly inside Gmail using AI draft generators, automated assignments, notes, tasks and much more.

results.title: The 9 best AI email assistants
results.content:
Automatic replies aren't the norm in the category yet. Good replies require context, meaning your inbox needs to be connected to your data sources. One of the trends of AI this year is the rise of MCP (Model Context Protocol, a connector standard for data and AI models), which might bring easier connectivity between apps, enabling a wave of hyper-personalized features in the software we use.

Still, if automatic replies are critical, you can consider connecting your email inbox to Zapier and using it to integrate with ChatGPT or other models, so it can generate emails for you and send them automatically. Here are a few examples to show you how it works.

### Get an AI-generated daily digest of your emails in Slack

Get an AI-generated daily digest of your emails in Slack

Try it

results.title: AI Email Assistant for Outlook | Microsoft 365
results.content:
01/    ### What is an AI email assistant?      An AI email assistant is a tool that helps people manage their inboxes. Also known as an AI email generator and email automation software, it can organize messages, suggest replies, prioritize important emails, draft emails, and even automate certain tasks, like scheduling meetings.      
    02/    ### Is there an AI email assistant for Outlook?      Yes. The AI email assistant for Outlook is Microsoft 365 Copilot, or simply Copilot in Outlook for short.      
    03/    ### Is there AI in Outlook that helps write emails?      Yes, Copilot in Outlook helps you write and edit emails. It can also adjust for tone, length, and audience. [...] Automated responses. For common questions, like “Can we reschedule?,” AI suggests quick, logical replies that you can send with just one click.
   AI-generated drafts. Ask an AI email assistant to write an email for you based on the context of a conversation—whether it’s a simple follow-up or something more detailed—saving you the time of starting from scratch.
   Polished writing. AI accounts for grammar and flow to keep your emails sounding crisp. Go a step further and tell the AI the tone you’d like to use to convey the most fitting voice.

 For example, let AI suggest thoughtful replies to thank-you messages and event invitations. 

 Benefits 

## Real-world benefits of AI email assistants [...] Definition 

## What is an AI email assistant?

 An AI email assistant is a tool that helps people manage their inboxes. Also known as an AI email generator and email automation software, it can organize messages, suggest replies, prioritize important emails, draft emails, and even automate certain tasks, like scheduling meetings.

 Businesses and individuals alike use the software to streamline communication, minimize inbox clutter, and spend less time on repetitive email tasks.

 InOutlook, there are many AI assisted tools, includingMicrosoft Copilot. 

 How it works 

## What can AI email assistants do?
